ogTitle: Jones Gully vs Josephville: Climate Safety

heading: Jones Gully vs Josephville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jones Gully, Queensland and Josephville, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Josephville has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jones Gully (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jones Gully or Josephville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jones Gully has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Josephville scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jones Gully scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Josephville scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jones Gully or Josephville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Josephville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
